---
title: "Hansen Econometrics in Lean"
---

::: {.hero-panel}
This site is the reader-facing map for the Lean formalization of Hansen's
*Econometrics*: theorem walkthroughs, assumption inventories, and coverage notes
that connect textbook statements to reusable Lean declarations.
:::

::: {.coverage-grid}
::: {.coverage-card}
### Walkthroughs
Hand-written theorem pages explain the statement, proof route, Lean formulation,
and downstream uses.
:::

::: {.coverage-card}
### Assumption Maps
Chapter pages collect the core mathematical hypotheses, their Lean names, and
the proof endpoints that consume them.
:::

::: {.coverage-card}
### Coverage
The coverage page summarizes which chapters have theorem-level Lean surfaces and
where the remaining gaps are tracked.
:::
:::

## Start Here

- [Coverage overview](coverage.qmd)
- [Assumption map](assumptions/index.qmd)
- [Chapter 2 best predictor walkthrough](walkthroughs/chapter2/best-predictor.qmd)
- [Theorem 3.2 walkthrough](walkthroughs/chapter3/theorem-3-2.qmd)
- [Chapter 3 projection matrices](walkthroughs/chapter3/projection-matrices.qmd)
- [Chapter 5 exact t inference](walkthroughs/chapter5/theorem-5-8-t-statistic.qmd)
- [Theorem 7.3 walkthrough](walkthroughs/chapter7/theorem-7-3.qmd)
- [Chapter 7 asymptotic inference](walkthroughs/chapter7/theorem-7-11-7-13-inference.qmd)
